reviews.review_description:
I haven’t sussed the controls yet, it would be nice if they used the standard swipe to turn around press to move type interface.  Clicking on a painting and putting me in front of it would be good. 
I agree more info on the painting would be good, an optional commentary maybe. 
I disagree about the galleries, they are fine, if you’re looking at the walls then you are missing the point, or battling the controls!

reviews.review_title: NOT PROPERLY EQUIPPED FOR THE OCULUS GO
reviews.review_description: I hate to give it such a low score since the paintings are beautiful, however, without a description of the art - who painted it, what it is called, etc... doesn't do me much good.  I have seen that there is away to pull up the info on each painting on youtube, but there is absolutely no possible way on the Oculus GO.  Also, the navigation is terrible.  Very difficult to get around... over all, very frustrating experience.  I hope they fix this issue, I would love to come back and learn and enjoy the artwork.
There are some great paintings to enjoy, but the controls on the Oculus Go are horrendous. Trying to move around the rooms is ridiculously fiddly and took away any fun.
